## Description
<!-- A clear, concise description of the task, feature, or improvement -->

## Type
<!-- Mark one with an "x" -->
- [ ] Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] Enhancement (improve existing functionality)
- [ ] Task / Chore (maintenance, tooling, documentation)
- [ ] Refactor

## Motivation / Context
<!-- Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Approach
<!-- Optional: outline of how this could be implemented -->

## Tasks
<!-- Break the work into discrete, checkable steps -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Define "done" with testable, specific outcomes -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Affected Area
- Stack: <!-- Android | Web | Cross-stack -->
- Component / Module:
- Related Functional Requirement (if known): <!-- e.g. FR1.1 -->

## Risks & Dependencies
<!-- Known risks, blockers, or dependencies on other work -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Links, references, screenshots, or other notes -->
